_note: Label Sprint round for cell-membrane — generated cell-membrane_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the cell membrane.

hotspots.label: Phospholipid head
hotspots.detail: The hydrophilic (water-loving) part, facing outward on both surfaces.

hotspots.label: Phospholipid tail
hotspots.detail: The hydrophobic (water-fearing) fatty-acid tails, facing inward.

hotspots.label: Integral (channel) protein
hotspots.detail: Spans the whole bilayer; forms a pore for ions/molecules to cross.

hotspots.label: Glycoprotein
hotspots.detail: A protein with a branched carbohydrate chain attached, used in cell recognition.

hotspots.label: Peripheral protein
hotspots.detail: Attached loosely to one face of the membrane, not spanning it.

hotspots.label: Cholesterol
hotspots.detail: Small molecules wedged between the fatty-acid tails; stabilise membrane fluidity.

generation_prompt: cell membrane cross-section in 3D, fluid mosaic model
